description_zh: 植物生长研究：物种、生育期、处理、环境、模型输入输出、数据和结果。
description_en: Plant-growth studies covering species, growth stage, treatments, environment, model I/O, data, and results.

fields.name: crop_species
fields.description: Extract the crop, plant species, cultivar, or genotype studied.

fields.name: growth_stage
fields.description: Extract the plant age, developmental phase, or growth stage.

fields.name: treatment
fields.description: Extract experimental treatments, interventions, or stress conditions.

fields.name: environment
fields.description: Extract greenhouse, field, chamber, climate, soil, and other growth conditions.

fields.name: model_input
fields.description: Extract model inputs such as images, time, weather, treatment, or sensor measurements.

fields.name: model_output
fields.description: Extract predicted plant traits, growth states, yields, or future observations.

fields.name: dataset
fields.description: Extract dataset size, plants, observations, imaging schedule, and train-test split.

fields.name: metric
fields.description: Extract evaluation metrics for prediction or biological agreement.

fields.name: result
fields.description: Extract the main biological or predictive findings, preferably with quantitative evidence.
